acceptance_criteria:
1. CompileExt trait defined
2. Blanket impl for all Signature types
3. compile() builds Registry
4. Registers Input and Output types
5. Creates PromptWorld from registry output
6. Builds SigMeta
7. Returns CompiledSignature
8. Usage: MySignature::compile()
9. cargo check passes
title: Implement CompileExt trait for Signature::compile()
